name: kafka-stream-aggregate
title: Aggregate
description: Aggregates a numeric field from Kafka messages over a streaming window. Emits sum/count/avg/min/max when the window closes. Supports event-time processing, watermarks, late-event routing, overflow policies, MessageID deduplication, idle-timeout auto-close, and keyed sub-windows.

display.description: Aggregate Kafka stream messages over tumbling or sliding windows (sum/count/avg/min/max).

display.name: Window Name
display.description: Unique name for this window instance. Shared across flow executions to maintain state (e.g. sensor-5s-sum).

display.name: Window Type
display.description: TumblingTime: fixed time buckets. TumblingCount: fixed event batches. SlidingTime: rolling last-N-seconds. SlidingCount: rolling last-N-events.

display.name: Window Size
display.description: Time-based: milliseconds (e.g. 5000=5s). Count-based: number of events per window.

display.name: Aggregate Function
display.description: Aggregation function applied to valueField over the window.

display.name: Event Time Field
display.description: Message field containing the event timestamp. Accepts Unix-ms (int64/float64) or RFC-3339 string. Leave empty to use wall-clock time.

display.name: Allowed Lateness (ms)
display.description: How many ms past the watermark a late event is still accepted. Events older than this are routed to the lateEvent output. 0 = reject all late events.

display.name: Max Buffer Size
display.description: Maximum events buffered per window. 0 = unlimited. Overflow is handled by overflowPolicy.

display.name: Overflow Policy
display.description: Action when maxBufferSize is exceeded. drop_oldest (default): evict oldest event. drop_newest: discard incoming. error: return hard error.

display.name: Idle Timeout (ms)
display.description: Auto-close a keyed sub-window that receives no event for this many ms and emit its partial result. 0 = disabled.

display.name: Persist Path
display.description: File path for window state snapshots (gob format). State is restored on startup and saved periodically. Leave empty to disable (default). Example: /var/flogo/state/sensor-window.gob

display.name: Persist Every N Messages
display.description: Trigger a background snapshot every N messages. 0 = flush only on graceful shutdown. Requires Persist Path to be set.

display.name: Event Timestamp (Unix ms)
display.description: Pre-resolved Unix-ms timestamp (int64). When non-zero, takes priority over eventTimeField. Map from Kafka headers, a flow variable, or any computed int64 expression.
